Bridge of Hope (Project Racing) Campaigning History Norfolk Enterprise Festival Gallery Contact Social Media Sign The Norfolk Way petition to save our Norfolk Way of Life Norfolk is a proud rural county. Our rural way of life, rural economy and local communities rely on farming, food production and distribution for its prosperity. The new Labour Government’s Family FarmTax, Small Business JobsTax and wider Tax plans will hammer an already fragile rural economy. All of us in Norfolk who care need to take a stand and speak with one voice. Join us by signing our petition here: Your Name Your Address Your Postcode Your email You can read my policy on how I handle your data here . Thank you for signing this petition.
